violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed box of food on floor in walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed soda dispenser needs to be cleaned between the nozzles.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor by fryer needs to be cleaned.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
